build: 4321 (legacy0001) with cc for x86_64-linux-gnu

usage: ./llama-server [options]

options:
  -h, --help                            print this help and exit
  -v, --verbose                         verbose output
  -c, --ctx-size N                      size of the prompt context (default: 512)
  -b, --batch-size N                    batch size for prompt processing (default: 512)
  -fa, --flash-attn                     enable Flash Attention
  -ctk, --cache-type-k TYPE             KV cache data type for K (default: f16)
  -ctv, --cache-type-v TYPE             KV cache data type for V (default: f16)
  -ngl, --n-gpu-layers N                number of layers to store in VRAM
  -np, --parallel N                     number of parallel sequences (default: 1)
  --host HOST                           ip address to listen (default: 127.0.0.1)
  --port PORT                           port to listen (default: 8080)
  -m, --model FNAME                     model path (default: models/7B/ggml-model-f16.gguf)
